div.p: From Ethernet payload to upper-layer delivery
Flow Legend: 🟦 Blue: Parsing/Extraction 🟧 Orange: Validation 🟪 Pink: Checksum 🟩 Green: Fragmentation 🟦 Cyan: Routing/Delivery 🟥 Red: Error/Drop
Ones' complement sum of all 16-bit words Result must be 0xFFFF
Host mode: drop Router mode: • Decrement TTL • Route lookup • Forward
